title: Iran vs New Zealand LIVE: Watch FIFA World Cup 2026 Group G TV stream, score, commentary & updates
description: Watch BBC One coverage, listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary, follow text and score updates and track the latest match stats as Iran take on New Zealand in a 2026 FIFA World Cup Group G match at Los Angeles Stadium in the United States.
content:

title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
description: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
content:
One of the most valuable assets owned by Lancaster University is stored in beer kegs.
But it's not in one of the student bars.

title: Labour risks handing No10 to Reform without drastic change, says union leader
description: Andrea Egan tellls the BBC that Labour haven't delivered and her election demonstrated that members were desperate to have their voices heard.
content:
Andrea Egan is about to attend her first conference of the country's biggest union, Unison, as its leader.
A grassroots campaigner for more than 30 years, she upset expectations when she defeated the incumbent general secretary, Christina McAnea, in ... [5934 chars]

title: 'Social media firms hit back' and 'Arson attack on Starmer linked to Russia'
description: Several of the papers are leading on Sir Keir's plan to ban social media for under-16s in the UK, which was announced on Monday.

title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
description: A government spokesman tells the BBC the current offer "does not do enough to protect consumers or the environment".
content:
The government has objected to a proposed rescue deal for Thames Water, in a move which takes the UK's largest water company a step closer to a form of nationalisation.
Environment Secretary Emma Reynolds wrote to the industry regulator on Monday to ... [4576 chars]
